name: Comprehensive test coverage for all modules

description:

- Sandbox: 94.27%→98.09% stmts, 396→450 tests  
- Subagent: 67.85%→96.61% stmts, 88→159 tests

asi.hypothesis: Parallel subagent approach for test creation across 3 modules
